title: Daemon crypto: key generation and session key derivation
description: Verify X25519 keypair generation, ECDH shared secret, and PSK-authenticated HKDF key derivation on the daemon side

steps.expected: Returns object with publicKey (Buffer, 32 bytes) and privateKey (KeyObject)

steps.action: Generate two keypairs, compute ECDH shared secret from both directions
steps.expected: Both directions produce identical 32-byte shared secret

steps.action: Call deriveSessionKey with shared secret, a test PSK, and two public keys
Derive session key with same inputs but swapped key order
steps.expected: Same session key (public keys are sorted alphabetically in HKDF info)

steps.action: Derive session key with a different PSK
steps.expected: Different session key (PSK affects HKDF salt)

steps.action: Call computeFingerprint on a known public key
steps.expected: Returns first 16 hex chars of SHA-256 hash, deterministic
